problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
